sentences.target: On parle de la population locale.

translations.fr: On parle de la population locale.
translations.en: We’re talking about the local population.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de la población local.
translations.de: Wir sprechen über die lokale Bevölkerung.
translations.ko: 우리는 지역 인구에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.yue: 我哋喺度講緊本地人口。
translations.pt: Estamos falando sobre a população local.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về dân số địa phương.
translations.nl: We praten over de lokale bevolking.
translations.hi: हम स्थानीय आबादी के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om den lokale befolkningen.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om den lokala befolkningen.
translations.da: Vi taler om den lokale befolkning.
translations.ja: 地域の人口について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/indefinite), 3rd person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate agreeing with 'On'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement ('de la population locale').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'population'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP governed by 'de'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifier of 'population'.

sentences.target: La population augmente dans notre quartier.

translations.fr: La population augmente dans notre quartier.
translations.en: The population is increasing in our neighborhood.
translations.es: La población está aumentando en nuestro barrio.
translations.de: Die Einwohnerzahl steigt in unserem Viertel.
translations.it: La popolazione aumenta nel nostro quartiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们社区的人口在增加。
translations.yue: 我哋社區嘅人口正在增加。
translations.ru: Численность населения в нашем районе растёт.
translations.pt: A população está aumentando no nosso bairro.
translations.vi: Dân số đang tăng lên ở khu phố của chúng tôi.
translations.nl: De bevolking neemt toe in onze wijk.
translations.hu: A lakosság növekszik a mi környékünkön.
translations.hi: हमारे मोहल्ले में जनसंख्या बढ़ रही है.
translations.pl: Liczba ludności w naszej okolicy rośnie.
translations.el: Ο πληθυσμός αυξάνεται στη γειτονιά μας.
translations.id: Jumlah penduduk di lingkungan kami sedang meningkat.
translations.cs: Počet obyvatel v naší čtvrti roste.
translations.ja: 私たちの地域で人口が増えています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'population'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'augmente'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('dans notre quartier').
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural, singular form; determiner of 'quartier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Je regarde des chiffres sur la population.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁəɡaʁd de ʃifʁ syʁ la pɔpylasjɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je regarde des chiffres sur la population.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁəɡaʁd de ʃifʁ syʁ la pɔpylasjɔ̃/
translations.en: I’m looking at figures about the population.
translations.es: Estoy mirando cifras sobre la población.
translations.de: Ich schaue mir Zahlen zur Bevölkerung an.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在看有关人口的数据。
translations.yue: 我正睇緊關於人口嘅數字。
translations.pt: Estou olhando números sobre a população.
translations.he: אני מסתכל על נתונים לגבי האוכלוסייה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang xem các con số về dân số.
translations.ar: أنا أنظر إلى أرقام عن السكان.
translations.nl: Ik bekijk cijfers over de bevolking.
translations.hi: मैं जनसंख्या से संबंधित आँकड़े देख रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg ser på tall om befolkningen.
translations.id: Saya sedang melihat angka tentang populasi.
translations.sv: Jag tittar på siffror om befolkningen.
translations.cs: Dívám se na čísla o populaci.
translations.da: Jeg kigger på tal om befolkningen.
translations.ja: 人口に関する数値を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of 'regarde'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb taking 'des chiffres' as direct object.
Indefinite plural article; determiner marking 'chiffres' as non-specific plural.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'regarde'.
Preposition introducing a PP ('sur la population') giving topic or reference.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'population'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: La population vieillit dans ce village.

translations.fr: La population vieillit dans ce village.
translations.en: The population is aging in this village.
translations.es: La población está envejeciendo en este pueblo.
translations.de: Die Bevölkerung in diesem Dorf altert.
translations.it: La popolazione sta invecchiando in questo villaggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个村庄的人口正在老龄化。
translations.yue: 呢條村嘅人口正在老化。
translations.pt: A população está envelhecendo nesta aldeia.
translations.vi: Dân số ở ngôi làng này đang già hóa.
translations.ar: السكان في هذه القرية يتقدمون في السن.
translations.nl: De bevolking in dit dorp vergrijst.
translations.hu: Ebben a faluban öregszik a lakosság.
translations.hi: इस गाँव में जनसंख्या बूढ़ी हो रही है.
translations.pl: W tej wiosce ludność się starzeje.
translations.el: Ο πληθυσμός σε αυτό το χωριό γερνά.
translations.nb: Befolkningen i denne landsbyen blir eldre.
translations.id: Penduduk di desa ini sedang menua.
translations.da: Befolkningen i denne landsby bliver ældre.
translations.ja: この村では人口が高齢化しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'population'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'vieillit'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate meaning 'to age'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('dans ce village').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determiner of 'village'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
